entity.summary: Hydra-based Cardano order-book decentralized exchange with current liquidity, active recent spot trading, and protocol fee generation.
entity.notes: The current first-party DeltaDeFi website remains available. DefiLlama identifies DeltaDeFi as a Hydra-based Cardano order-book DEX and reports current TVL, non-zero recent fees and revenue, and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: DeltaDeFi official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website establishes the active DeltaDeFi identity and exchange surface.

evidence.title: DeltaDeFi metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies DeltaDeFi as a Hydra-based Cardano order-book DEX and reports current TVL, fee and revenue activity, and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: DeltaDeFi DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies DeltaDeFi as a Cardano decentralized exchange.
